title: Rotbar
description: Adds rotation and fog information to the right side of the hotbar.
body:
Adds yaw, pitch, fog end, and fog color information to the **right side\*** of the hotbar.

The topmost number is yaw in degrees and ranges from -179.99 to 180.00.  
The middle number is pitch in degrees and ranges from -90.00 to 90.00.  
The bottom number is fog end distance in blocks.

There is a compass beside the yaw number which can indicate cardinal directions (N E S W) and ordinal directions (NE NW SE SW). Up is north.

There is an indicator which displays whether you are looking up or down beside the pitch number.

The fog color can be found beside the fog end distance number.

**\*Since all information is presented on the right side, your main hand should be right for the best experience.**
